items.scenario: You are a second-year student in Professor Whitman's Introduction to Statistics course. The course recently switched its required software from Excel to R without prior notice, and you have no prior coding experience. The next assignment is due in five days and you are struggling to complete it.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Whitman. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the difficulty you are having with the new software
Ask whether tutoring or written guides are available
Suggest a brief in-class walkthrough for students new to R
items.subject: Difficulty adjusting to the new R software requirement

items.scenario: You work part-time at a campus bookstore where your manager just introduced a new mobile app for checking in and out of shifts. After two weeks of using it, you and several coworkers have noticed that the app frequently logs incorrect hours, especially during busy periods. Payroll is being affected.
items.direction: Write an email to your manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the recurring problem with the time-tracking app
Mention how it has affected your pay and that of coworkers
Suggest a temporary paper backup until the app is reliable
items.subject: Recurring time-tracking errors with the new shift app

items.scenario: You ordered a pair of running shoes from an online sports retailer two weeks ago. When the package arrived, the shoes were two sizes too small and one of the soles had a noticeable manufacturing defect. The retailer's website only offers store credit, not a refund.
items.direction: Write an email to the retailer's customer service team. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe both problems with the shoes you received
Ask for a full refund rather than store credit
Provide your order number and preferred return method
items.subject: Wrong size and defective sole on order #SL-44218

items.scenario: You are a regular user of the public swimming pool at the Maplewood Community Center. Over the past month, the pool has reduced its evening hours from 9 PM to 7 PM, which makes it impossible for many working residents to use it after work. Attendance during the day appears very low.
items.direction: Write an email to the community center director. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe how the shorter hours affect working residents
Mention the low daytime attendance you have observed
Suggest restoring at least one or two late evenings each week
items.subject: Concern about the recent reduction in evening pool hours
